MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant in Propria Persona for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. No appearance. Defendant Ares Pappas is sanctioned $300.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette CSR# 5963. (212)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant in Propria Persona Ares Pappas for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to Plaintiff's Counsel off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Court ordered Defendant in Propria Persona Ares Pappas sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/19/2009 at 10:30 AM. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. (212)
